form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] ruleName[规则名称] priority[优先级] territoryId[目标区域] =========>condition[条件]====== conditionType[条件类型] conditionValue[条件值] assignmentMethod[分配方法] groupId[分组] isDefault[是否默认] isActive[是否启用] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] ruleName[规则名称] priority[优先级] territoryId[目标区域] =========>condition[条件]====== conditionType[条件类型] conditionValue[条件值] assignmentMethod[分配方法] groupId[分组] isDefault[是否默认] isActive[是否启用] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: ruleName[规则名称] orgId[业务组织] territoryId[目标区域] conditionType[条件类型] isActive[是否启用]
